name: Thai Fresh Cucumber Salad (Taeng Kwa Brio Wan
recipeIngredient: 3 medium Cucumbers, sliced as thinly as possible
recipeInstructions:
1. If necessary, peel the cucumbers if they are waxed; otherwise, remove all the peel.
2. In a bowl, generously salt the sliced cucumbers and let them sit for at least 30 minutes, stirring occasionally.
3. Combine the remaining ingredients (sugar dissolved in hot water, white vinegar, and minced onion or scallions) in another bowl.
4. After the cucumbers have been salted, squeeze out as much of the cucumber juice as possible using a double layer of cheesecloth or a dish towel. Twist until no more juice can be extracted.
5. Mix the squeezed cucumbers with the sauce and place the mixture in a serving bowl.
6. Refrigerate until ready to serve.
